display_text: Sacred Relic, Cost: 3400: Provides no teamfight utility on its own but drastically amplifies the damage output of a core hero, allowing them to hit critical thresholds for hero kills and tower destruction. Its value is purely in scaling offensive power.

display_text: Sacred Relic, Cost: 3400: Core purchase for heroes who scale with raw attack damage and seek to build items like Radiance or Divine Rapier. It is a key timing item for heroes looking to dominate the late game with overwhelming right-click damage. The high cost requires significant farming commitment.
